top_signals.title: S&P Futures Climb as US-Iran Deal Takes Effect: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: US stock futures climbed while oil prices extended declines as President Donald Trump signed an interim deal to end the war with Iran and reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Inside India newsletter: Anthropic curbs ignite AI debate in India — efforts 'too slow, way too small'
top_signals.summary: India's ambitions of becoming a global AI innovation powerhouse by building applications on top of foreign foundational models are being challenged.

top_signals.title: Play Riffa and Mar to leave Scandinavia out in gold
top_signals.summary: ROYAL Ascot rises to a crescendo on Thursday with the centrepiece of the five days being the Group One Gold Cup (4.15pm). This is the ultimate test for stayers, run over a punishing two-and-a-half miles of Ascot, where only the toughest horses rise to the top. Trawlerman has already proven he has all the attributes [...]

top_signals.title: Protecting Crew Lives Launches Resource Platform for Superyacht Crews
top_signals.summary: A new independent platform has launched that arms superyacht crew with the knowledge, resources and voice that maritime law already entitles them to but that the industry has consistently failed to deliver, says Protecting Crew Lives (PCL).The platform is a centralised…
